title: RawFact
description: Canonical schema for raw fact data captured by crawl pipelines

source_url.description: Original URL the fact was crawled from

crawled_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the crawl occurred

crawler_name.description: Identifier of the crawler that produced this fact

title.description: Page title or headline extracted from source

content_raw.description: Full text content extracted from the source (markdown or plain text)

customer_context.description: Structured context for future test simulation

use_case_summary.description: One-paragraph summary of how the customer uses Claude

quantitative_claims.description: Measurable outcomes cited (e.g., '87% reduction in support time')

extensions.description: Crawler-specific fields (not part of base schema)
